final:
// // This JK latch will only set Q when J=0 and K=1, and reset it when J=1 and K=0.
module jk_latch (
    input wire J,
    input wire K,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        case ({J, K})
            2'b00: Q <= Q;       // Maintain current state
            2'b01: Q <= 0;       // Reset
            2'b10: Q <= 1;       // Set
            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;      // Toggle
        endcase
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This JK latch will only set Q when J=0 and K=1, and reset it when J=1 and K=0.
